name: Bitwise Dogecoin ETF
business: Bitwise Dogecoin ETF is an investment trust that seeks to provide exposure to the value of Dogecoin by holding Dogecoin as its sole asset. It issues shares that are listed on NYSE Arca under the ticker BWOW.

exposures.sentence: The Trust's primary investment objective is to seek to provide exposure to the value of Dogecoin held by the Trust, less the expenses of the Trust's operations, which is generally just the sponsor's management fee.
